emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the The Diamond Coast Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations. No pitch.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 60/100
========================================

Platform: WordPress

Issues found: 11

HIGH PRIORITY
--------------------
- 29 external scripts
  29 script tags means 3-5+ seconds of load time on standard connections.

MEDIUM PRIORITY
--------------------
- 21 images missing alt text
  Alt text helps screen readers and helps Google understand your images.

MEDIUM PRIORITY
--------------------
- Page is 405KB
  Pages over 250KB load slowly on mobile.

MEDIUM PRIORITY
--------------------
- 28 broken image(s)
  Images that fail to load show blank boxes or broken icons.

MEDIUM PRIORITY
--------------------
- Contact form hidden on subpage
  The homepage lacks a contact form. There is one on /contact, but visitors reaching the homepage may not find it.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Placeholder/low-quality images detected
  Some images appear to be placeholders (very small dimensions).

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- SSL certificate expires in 57 days
  SSL cert renews on Jun 27 14:27:48 2026 GMT. Mark your calendar.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing HSTS header
  HTTP Strict Transport Security tells browsers to always use HTTPS. Without it, a downgrade attack is possible.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing Content Security Policy
  CSP helps prevent XSS attacks by controlling which resources can load.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing X-Frame-Options header
  Without this, your site could be embedded in an iframe on another site (clickjacking risk).

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing X-Content-Type-Options header
  This prevents MIME-type sniffing attacks.

WHAT IS WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Page title is set
+ Meta description present
+ Uses H1 heading
+ No mixed content
+ 37 images on the page
+ Efficient CSS setup
+ Analytics active
+ Clean sans-serif body font
+ Uses modern CSS layout (Flexbox/Grid)
+ Viewport meta tag present (mobile-friendly setup)
+ Uses modern rounded corners / cards
+ Uses shadows for visual depth
+ Contact form/page found on: /contact
+ Built with WordPress
+ Contact form found on: /contact
+ Built with WordPress

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.
If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios
Websites for small businesses in Ireland.

issues.detail: Alt text helps screen readers and helps Google understand your images.
issues.label: 21 images missing alt text
issues.check: Right-click an image and inspect. Check if it has an 'alt' attribute.
issues.siteHint: Blind visitors cannot use your site. Google also gets weaker signals from images.

issues.detail: 29 script tags means 3-5+ seconds of load time on standard connections.
issues.label: 29 external scripts
issues.check: Open DevTools Network tab. Filter by JS. Count how many files load.
issues.siteHint: Slow sites lose ~40% of visitors who expect under 3 second load times.

issues.detail: Pages over 250KB load slowly on mobile.
issues.label: Page is 405KB
issues.check: Open DevTools Network tab. Check the Size column for large images or files.

issues.detail: Images that fail to load show blank boxes or broken icons.
issues.label: 28 broken image(s)
issues.check: Scroll through the page. Do you see any broken image icons?
issues.siteHint: Broken images look unprofessional. Each one should load properly.

issues.detail: Some images appear to be placeholders (very small dimensions).
issues.label: Placeholder/low-quality images detected
issues.check: Do any images look like grey boxes or low-res blurs where real images should be?
issues.siteHint: Replace placeholder images with actual photography or graphics.

issues.detail: SSL cert renews on Jun 27 14:27:48 2026 GMT. Mark your calendar.
issues.label: SSL certificate expires in 57 days
issues.check: Check the lock icon in the address bar.
issues.siteHint: Just a reminder ÔÇö easy to forget until it is too late.

issues.detail: HTTP Strict Transport Security tells browsers to always use HTTPS. Without it, a downgrade attack is possible.
issues.label: Missing HSTS header
issues.check: Open DevTools ÔåÆ Network ÔåÆ click the first request ÔåÆ look for "strict-transport-security".
issues.siteHint: HSTS is a simple config that hardens your site against protocol downgrade attacks.

issues.detail: CSP helps prevent XSS attacks by controlling which resources can load.
issues.label: Missing Content Security Policy
issues.check: Check DevTools Console for CSP-related warnings.
issues.siteHint: A basic CSP blocks most common script injection attacks.

issues.detail: Without this, your site could be embedded in an iframe on another site (clickjacking risk).
issues.label: Missing X-Frame-Options header
issues.check: Check if the site has X-Frame-Options: DENY or SAMEORIGIN in response headers.
issues.siteHint: Without this, others could embed your site on malicious pages.

issues.label: Missing X-Content-Type-Options header
issues.check: Check DevTools Network tab for the header.

issues.detail: The homepage lacks a contact form. There is one on /contact, but visitors reaching the homepage may not find it.
issues.label: Contact form hidden on subpage
issues.check: Look at the top-level navigation. Is "Contact" easy to find from the homepage?
issues.siteHint: A visible contact form on the main page can increase inquiries by 30-50%. Visitors should not have to hunt for it.
